description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house surrounded by dense evergreen trees, set on a rectangular grassy plot. The house features a flat roof with multiple levels and sections, including a prominent garage on one side and a main entryway with a stone path leading up to it. The exterior is primarily finished in reddish-brown brick, with large windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, allowing for ample natural light. The rear of the house includes expansive glass panels and a possible patio area, while the landscaping is dominated by tall coniferous trees providing privacy and a natural setting. The driveway leads to a double garage, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small porch and steps. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A large, modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, expansive windows, and a double garage, surrounded by dense evergreen trees on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, stone path, double garage, and a clear view of the flat roof and brick facade.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the large glass windows, rear patio area, and dense tree coverage on the back and side.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by tall evergreen trees, with only the upper part of the house and roof visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the garage, side entry, and a mix of brick and window features, with the driveway and more trees visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a prominent door, accessed by a stone path and flanked by brick columns.
